image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: One harvests chemical energy; the other harvests light.
Context visual: Both processes are vital for life on Earth and beyond.
Escalation visual: Photosynthesis converts sunlight into energy, fueling plants and, ultimately, animals.
Evidence visual: On the flip side, chemosynthesis thrives in dark, extreme environments, like deep-sea vents.
Payoff visual: Both processes create ecosystems, proving life can adapt in unimaginable ways.
Cta visual: Want to learn more about the science behind life? Hit subscribe!
